hero.headline: Keep Your Car Running Smoothly with P V Auto Services
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, we deliver quality workmanship and transparent service you can count on.

featureSections.title: Advanced Engine & System Diagnostics
featureSections.body: Our technicians use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately. Whether it's a check engine light or a performance problem, we get to the root cause efficiently.
featureSections.cardBody: Accurate diagnostics mean fewer return visits and repairs done right the first time.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: From oil changes to brake replacements, we handle all makes and models. Our team is dedicated to keeping your vehicle safe, reliable, and performing at its best.
featureSections.cardBody: We never upsell unnecessary services. You'll get a clear explanation and fair pricing every time.

home.whyTitle: Why Choose P V Auto Services?

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team has decades of combined experience servicing all vehicle types, ensuring quality workmanship you can trust.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide upfront estimates with no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what to expect before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer-First Approach
whyChooseUs.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We take the time to explain repairs and answer all your questions.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Location
whyChooseUs.description: Located in central Dallas, we offer easy drop-off and quick turnaround times to get you back on the road.

testimonials.quote: I've been bringing my car here for years. They're honest, fair, and always do great work. Highly recommend!

testimonials.quote: Fast, reliable service at a reasonable price. They diagnosed my issue quickly and had me back on the road the same day.
testimonials.author: Sarah L.

testimonials.quote: Finally found a mechanic I trust. They explain everything clearly and never try to sell me things I don't need.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Care?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the P V Auto difference.

servicesPage.intro: At P V Auto Services, we offer a full range of automotive services to keep your vehicle running at its best. From routine maintenance to major repairs, our experienced technicians use the latest tools and techniques to ensure quality and reliability.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake services to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most important safety feature. We inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, calipers, and more. Whether you're hearing squeaks or feeling vibrations, we'll restore your stopping power.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect pads, rotors, lines, and fluid levels.

process.title: Repair/Replace
process.description: We replace worn components using quality parts.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test your brakes to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles, depending on driving habits and conditions.

faqs.question: What are signs my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squeaking, grinding, a soft pedal, or a vibrating steering wheel are common indicators.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and reliable engine repair.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car isn't performing as it should, our advanced diagnostic tools quickly identify the issue. We repair everything from minor sensor replacements to major engine overhauls.

process.title: Scan
process.description: We connect diagnostic equipment to read error codes.

process.title: Analyze
process.description: Our technicians interpret data and inspect related components.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We perform necessary repairs with precision and care.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be a loose gas cap, a faulty sensor, or a more serious issue. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose all car makes?
faqs.answer: Yes, our equipment works on domestic and import vehicles.

services.title: Oil Changes & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the cornerstone of vehicle maintenance. We use quality oils and filters to protect your engine. We also check and top off all vital fluids, including coolant, transmission, and brake fluid.

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We safely drain and dispose of used oil.

process.title: Replace Filter
process.description: A new oil filter is installed to ensure cleanliness.

process.title: Fill & Check
process.description: Fresh oil is added, and all fluid levels are inspected.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000 to 5,000 miles for conventional oil, or up to 7,500 for synthetic.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic options to match your vehicle's needs.

services.title: Tire Services & Alignment
services.shortDescription: Proper tire care for safety and performance.
services.longDescription: Your tires are your connection to the road. We provide tire rotation, balancing, and alignment services to ensure even wear, better handling, and improved fuel economy. We also offer tire repair and replacement.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check tire condition, pressure, and tread depth.

process.title: Service
process.description: Rotation, balancing, or alignment as needed.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We verify proper inflation and test drive.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 6,000 to 8,000 miles, or as recommended by your vehicle manufacturer.

faqs.question: What are signs I need an alignment?
faqs.answer: Uneven tire wear, pulling to one side, or a crooked steering wheel when driving straight.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Auto Repair Shop
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality automotive service that keeps our customers safe and satisfied.
story: P V Auto Services has been a staple in the Dallas community for decades, serving drivers with integrity and expertise. Our team of skilled mechanics brings years of experience from dealerships and independent shops, combining deep knowledge with a customer-first philosophy.

We believe in transparency, quality parts, and fair pricing. Every repair is backed by our commitment to excellence, ensuring you leave with a vehicle you can trust. Whether it's a simple oil change or a complex engine repair, we treat your car like it's our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always provide honest assessments and never recommend unnecessary repairs.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow industry best practices for every service.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We complete work on time and stand behind our repairs.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: Proudly serving Dallas with friendly, local service you can count on.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with P V Auto Services
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your auto repair needs. Call or visit us today.
